series_metadata.series_description: Long term projections analyzing economic developments and trends, labor supply and demand, occupational guidance to education, and providers of training and career guidance to Ohio’s workforce. Projections include: the Projections Suite processing for the State of Ohio’s economic development regions and metropolitan areas; all publications for industry and occupational employment projections, which contain printouts and e-files used to populate the Workforce Information Database and create the published reports; historical data, semilog time trend regression analysis for economic development regions; research background and labor force participation rates by race, age and sex for the State of Ohio.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office 10 years, thenreview by State Archives priorto disposition., Electronic: Erase
